# Paleoredox

**Summary**: The chemical state of an environment in terms of oxidation and reduction.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] assessed paleoredox using V/Cr, Mo/Al, Co/Al, and Fe/Al ratios.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Determines oxygen availability in bottom waters during the Silurian.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018]] Ratio analysis of redox-sensitive trace elements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- A major change to dysoxic conditions was identified at the base of the Mdg facies. ([[2018-perdana|Perdana, 2018, p. 98]])
